rationale: Mechanical & Aerospace L4 splits each L3 by named application or methodology. Solid mechanics by failure regime; aerospace by system class; thermal by transport mode; manufacturing by process family; civil by structural type. 1-3 L4 per L3.

leaves.name: Finite Deformation Plasticity
leaves.tagline: Finite deformation plasticity, crystal plasticity, large-strain modeling.

leaves.name: Elastic Instabilities & Buckling
leaves.tagline: Elastic instabilities, buckling, post-buckling, programmable instabilities.

leaves.name: Ductile & Brittle Fracture
leaves.tagline: Ductile + brittle fracture, ductile fracture mechanisms, hydrogen embrittlement.

leaves.name: Fatigue & Damage Tolerance
leaves.tagline: Fatigue + damage tolerance, very-high-cycle fatigue, AM-part fatigue.

leaves.name: Tribology, Friction & Wear
leaves.tagline: Tribology, friction + wear, contact mechanics, micro-scale tribology.

leaves.name: Micromechanics & Multi-Scale
leaves.tagline: Micromechanics, multi-scale solid mechanics, homogenization theory.

leaves.name: Phase-Field & Damage FEM
leaves.tagline: Phase-field models, damage FEM, crack propagation by phase field.

leaves.name: Isogeometric & Meshless Methods
leaves.tagline: Isogeometric analysis, meshless methods, MPM + SPH for mechanics.

leaves.name: RANS/LES Turbulence Modeling
leaves.tagline: RANS + LES turbulence modeling, hybrid RANS-LES, ML-augmented turbulence models.

leaves.name: Hybrid RANS-LES
leaves.tagline: Hybrid RANS-LES (DES, IDDES, ZDES), industrial-scale turbulence simulation.

leaves.name: Particulate & Bubbly Flows
leaves.tagline: Particulate + bubbly flows, gas-liquid-solid flows, multiphase reactor flow.

leaves.name: Droplet Microfluidics
leaves.tagline: Droplet microfluidics, single-cell droplet platforms, lab-on-chip droplet engineering.

leaves.name: EV & Vehicle Aerodynamics
leaves.tagline: EV + vehicle aerodynamics, low-drag passenger vehicle design, truck aerodynamics.

leaves.name: Marine Hydrodynamics
leaves.tagline: Marine hydrodynamics, hull design CFD, wave-resistance optimization.

leaves.name: Radiative Heat Transfer
leaves.tagline: Radiative heat transfer, surface emissivity engineering, near-field radiation.

leaves.name: Two-Phase Cooling
leaves.tagline: Two-phase cooling, boiling enhancement, vapor-chamber cooling for electronics.

leaves.name: Datacenter Thermal Management
leaves.tagline: Datacenter cooling, immersion cooling, single-phase + two-phase server cooling.

leaves.name: EV Thermal Management
leaves.tagline: EV thermal management, battery cooling, integrated thermal architecture for EVs.

leaves.name: Low-Energy Building HVAC
leaves.tagline: Low-energy building HVAC, ML for building control, advanced HVAC research.

leaves.name: eVTOL & UAM Aircraft Design
leaves.tagline: eVTOL design, urban air mobility aircraft, distributed propulsion design.

leaves.name: Novel Aircraft Configurations
leaves.tagline: Novel aircraft configurations, blended wing-body, transonic truss-braced wings.

leaves.name: SmallSat & CubeSat Design
leaves.tagline: SmallSat + CubeSat design, mission engineering for small spacecraft constellations.

leaves.name: Deep Space Mission Engineering
leaves.tagline: Deep space mission engineering, sample return missions, outer-planet missions.

leaves.name: Scramjets & Hypersonic Aero
leaves.tagline: Scramjets, hypersonic aerodynamics, high-T material engineering at hypersonic speed.

leaves.name: Autonomous Flight GNC
leaves.tagline: Autonomous flight GNC, formation flight, learning-based aircraft GNC.

leaves.name: Low-NOx & Clean Combustion
leaves.tagline: Low-NOx + clean combustion, lean premixed combustion, hydrogen/ammonia combustion.

leaves.name: Hydrogen & Ammonia IC Engines
leaves.tagline: Hydrogen + ammonia IC engines, hydrogen combustion engines, ammonia engines.

leaves.name: Land-Based Gas Turbines
leaves.tagline: Land-based gas turbines for power generation, hydrogen-ready gas turbines.

leaves.name: Electric Aerospace Propulsion
leaves.tagline: Electric aerospace propulsion, hybrid-electric aircraft propulsion.

leaves.name: Laser PBF (SLM)
leaves.tagline: Laser PBF, SLM, melt-pool physics in metal AM, process-microstructure for SLM.

leaves.name: Electron-Beam PBF
leaves.tagline: Electron-beam PBF, EBM, high-temperature alloy AM.

leaves.name: FDM & Vat Photopolymer AM
leaves.tagline: FDM, vat photopolymer AM, DLP + SLA + CLIP printing.

leaves.name: In-Situ AM Defect Monitoring
leaves.tagline: In-situ AM defect monitoring, closed-loop AM control, defect detection via ML.

leaves.name: Ultra-Precision Machining
leaves.tagline: Ultra-precision machining, diamond turning, micro-machining.

leaves.name: Industry 4.0 Digital Twins
leaves.tagline: Industry 4.0 digital twins, ML for process monitoring, smart manufacturing platforms.

leaves.name: Performance-Based Structural Design
leaves.tagline: Performance-based structural design, structural reliability, seismic design optimization.

leaves.name: Seismic Isolation & Damping
leaves.tagline: Seismic isolation + damping, base-isolation systems, supplemental dampers.

leaves.name: ML for Transportation Engineering
leaves.tagline: ML for transportation engineering, traffic prediction, pavement condition assessment.

leaves.name: Geotechnical Hazards & Foundation Engineering
leaves.tagline: Geotechnical hazards, foundation engineering, slope stability + liquefaction.

leaves.name: Sustainable Cement & Concrete
leaves.tagline: Sustainable cement + concrete, low-carbon cement, geopolymer concrete.

leaves.name: Self-Healing Concrete
leaves.tagline: Self-healing concrete, smart construction materials, sensor-embedded structures.

leaves.name: EV Traction & Vehicle Dynamics
leaves.tagline: EV powertrain engineering, vehicle dynamics, energy management in vehicles.

leaves.name: AV Sensor Stack Integration
leaves.tagline: AV sensor stack integration, vehicle-level autonomy hardware, ADAS engineering.

leaves.name: Soft Actuators & Dielectric Elastomer
leaves.tagline: Soft actuators, dielectric elastomer actuators, fluidic soft actuators.

leaves.name: Compliant Mechanisms
leaves.tagline: Compliant mechanisms, origami-inspired mechanisms, programmable kinematics.

leaves.name: Exoskeleton Mechanical Design
leaves.tagline: Exoskeleton mechanical design, gait assistance exoskeletons, industrial exoskeletons.

leaves.name: Prosthetic Limb & Osseointegration
leaves.tagline: Prosthetic limb mechanics, osseointegration, neural-prosthetic interfaces.

leaves.name: MSK & Cardiovascular Biomechanics
leaves.tagline: MSK biomechanics, cardiovascular biomechanics, biomechanical imaging research.

uncovered_concerns: Marine & Ocean Engineering papers fold under marine-hydrodynamics + EV traction L4.
Design + optimization (topology, generative) folds under computational mechanics + smart manufacturing L4.
